headline: Trump, buoyed by his deal with Iran, shows renewed interest in Ukraine at G7 summit
description: European leaders, who would like the US to reengage in the conflict between Moscow and Kyiv, encouraged the American president's enthusiasm about his memorandum of understanding with Tehran and confirmed their offer of assistance in the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: French environment minister's absence from public debate underscores government's climate inaction
2026 World Cup: Uneven French team opens with win against Senegal
European Parliament approves Turnberry agreement on tariffs between EU and US
description: The European Parliament voted on Tuesday, June 16, to eliminate customs duties on most American imports. Lawmakers secured a few safeguards in case Washington does not honor its commitments.

headline: Hungarian media landscape upended after Viktor Orban's fall from power
description: After many Hungarian media outlets were turned into propaganda machines under the previous government, the new prime minister, Péter Magyar, is moving swiftly to overhaul public broadcasting conglomerate MTVA, which includes the national news agency MTI.

headline: Amid the ruins of Southern Lebanon, Hezbollah declares victory over Israel
description: Thousands of Lebanese civilians who had fled the fighting have begun returning to villages south of the Litani River, which were heavily bombarded over the 105 days of war. The Shiite armed group and political party is feeling emboldened, both in relation to the Lebanese state and to Israel, by the memorandum of understanding reached between Washington and Tehran.

headline: 'The relationship with Washington that once underpinned Netanyahu's power has become a burden'
description: The strategic impasse resulting from the attack on Iran has intensified the shift in American public opinion, which has grown increasingly weary of Israel's endless wars, writes Le Monde columnist Gilles Paris.

description: As his second term grows increasingly complex at home amid the killing of 11-year-old Lyhanna, the French president, who is chairing the G7 summit in Evian, is staking his legitimacy on an ambitious international agenda.

headline: After the US-Iran deal, Israel revels in its military might but finds itself at a strategic impasse
description: While Israel aimed to eliminate the 'existential threat' posed by the Iranian regime, it was sidelined from the memorandum of understanding reached Sunday between the US and Iran. Meanwhile, its military now risks losing its freedom of action in Lebanon.

headline: The Swiss canton attracting Dubai's ultra-wealthy
description: Known for its favorable tax system, Zug is attracting rich individuals looking for security and stability. The trend is also spreading to other regions of the country.
